mapper.sql: select c.id as course_id, c.course_code, c.course_name, c.course_category, c.description, c.allow_download, owner.nick_name as owner_name, cu.start_at as access_start_at, cu.end_at as access_end_at, kb.id as knowledge_base_id, case when kbv.status = 'published' then kbv.id end as published_version_id, case when kbv.status = 'published' then kbv.version_no end as published_version_no, (select max(a.occurred_at) from student_learning_activity a where a.tenant_id=cu.tenant_id and a.user_id=cu.user_id and a.course_id=cu.course_id and a.del_flag='0') as last_visited_at, case when cu.access_status != 'active' then 'access_disabled' when c.status != 'active' then 'course_disabled' when cu.start_at is not null and cu.start_at > now() then 'not_started' when cu.end_at is not null and cu.end_at <= now() then 'expired' when kbv.id is null or kbv.status != 'published' then 'content_preparing' else 'available' end as availability from course_user cu join course c on c.id = cu.course_id and c.tenant_id = cu.tenant_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join sys_user owner on owner.user_id = c.owner_user_id left join knowledge_base kb on kb.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and kb.course_id = c.id and kb.del_flag = '0' left join knowledge_base_version kbv on kbv.id = kb.current_version_id and kbv.knowledge_base_id = kb.id and kbv.del_flag = '0'
select cu.*, u.user_name, u.nick_name from course_user cu left join sys_user u on u.user_id = cu.user_id
mapper.select: where cu.course_id = #{courseId} and cu.del_flag = '0' order by case cu.access_role when 'owner' then 1 when 'teacher' then 2 else 3 end, cu.id
where cu.course_id = #{courseId} and cu.id = #{id} and cu.del_flag = '0'
where cu.course_id = #{courseId} and cu.user_id = #{userId} and cu.del_flag = '0'

where cu.course_id = #{courseId} and cu.user_id = #{userId} and cu.del_flag = '0' and cu.access_status = 'active' and (cu.start_at is null or cu.start_at <= now()) and (cu.end_at is null or cu.end_at > now())

where cu.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and cu.user_id = #{userId} and cu.access_role = 'student' and cu.del_flag = '0' order by (select max(a.occurred_at) from student_learning_activity a where a.tenant_id=cu.tenant_id and a.user_id=cu.user_id and a.course_id=cu.course_id and a.del_flag='0') desc nulls last, case when cu.access_status = 'active' and c.status = 'active' and (cu.start_at is null or cu.start_at <= now()) and (cu.end_at is null or cu.end_at > now()) and kbv.id is not null and kbv.status = 'published' then 1 when cu.access_status = 'active' and c.status = 'active' and (cu.start_at is null or cu.start_at <= now()) and (cu.end_at is null or cu.end_at > now()) then 2 else 3 end, c.sort_order, c.id desc
where cu.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and cu.course_id = #{courseId} and cu.user_id = #{userId} and cu.access_role = 'student' and cu.del_flag = '0'

select cu.tenant_id, cu.user_id, cu.course_id, cu.id as course_user_id, kb.id as knowledge_base_id, case when kbv.status = 'published' then kbv.id end as published_version_id, case when kbv.status = 'published' then kbv.version_no end as published_version_no from course_user cu join course c on c.id = cu.course_id and c.tenant_id = cu.tenant_id and c.del_flag = '0' and c.status = 'active' left join knowledge_base kb on kb.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and kb.course_id = c.id and kb.del_flag = '0' left join knowledge_base_version kbv on kbv.id = kb.current_version_id and kbv.knowledge_base_id = kb.id and kbv.del_flag = '0' where cu.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and cu.course_id = #{courseId} and cu.user_id = #{userId} and cu.access_role = 'student' and cu.del_flag = '0' and cu.access_status = 'active' and (cu.start_at is null or cu.start_at <= now()) and (cu.end_at is null or cu.end_at > now())
mapper.update:
update course_user
access_role = #{accessRole}, access_status = #{accessStatus}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
update course_user set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{username}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
